# UISchema — Machine-Readable Project Spec

> For AI coding agents, LLM tools, and automated tooling.

## What is UISchema?

UISchema is a JSON schema standard + streaming protocol for AI-generated UI components. It is the "intermediate representation" (IR) between an AI language model's text output and rendered React/Vue/DOM components.

**Core value prop**: AI models output UISchema JSON instead of HTML or JSX. This uses 3-5x fewer tokens, is validated against a formal schema, and streams progressively via JSONL patch operations.

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/skeehn/ui-schema
- npm: @uischema/core, @uischema/react, @uischema/compressed, @uischema/protocol, @uischema/bridges, @uischema/cli

## Package Map

| Package | Path | Purpose |
|---------|------|---------|
| @uischema/core | packages/uischema-core/ | Schema types, Zod validators, builder API |
| @uischema/react | packages/uischema-react/ | React renderer, useUIStream hook, generateUISchema |
| @uischema/compressed | packages/uischema-compressed/ | CFG shorthand parser (3-5x token reduction) |
| @uischema/protocol | packages/uischema-protocol/ | JSONL patches, events, UISchemaEventBus |
| @uischema/bridges | packages/uischema-bridges/ | Open-JSON-UI, AG-UI, MCP Apps bridges |
| @uischema/cli | packages/uischema-cli/ | CLI: init, validate, preview, generate |

## Key Source Files

- `packages/uischema-core/src/types.ts` — All TypeScript types
- `packages/uischema-core/src/validators/zod.ts` — Zod schema validators
- `packages/uischema-core/src/builder.ts` — Fluent builder API
- `packages/uischema-core/schema/uischema.json` — JSON Schema definition
- `packages/uischema-react/src/renderer/react.tsx` — React renderer
- `packages/uischema-react/src/registry/components.ts` — Component registry
- `packages/uischema-react/src/hooks/useUIStream.ts` — Streaming hook
- `packages/uischema-react/src/ai/generate.ts` — generateUISchema() helper
- `packages/uischema-protocol/src/bus.ts` — UISchemaEventBus
- `packages/uischema-protocol/src/patches.ts` — JSONL patch operations
- `packages/uischema-protocol/src/events.ts` — Event type definitions
- `packages/uischema-cli/src/cli.ts` — CLI entry point
- `docs-site/app/api/generate/route.ts` — Next.js API route for AI generation

## Core Schema Format

```json
{
  "schemaVersion": "0.1.0",
  "root": {
    "type": "Container",
    "props": {
      "ariaLabel": "My UI",
      "className": "my-container"
    },
    "children": [
      {
        "type": "Text",
        "props": { "text": "Hello world" }
      },
      {
        "type": "Button",
        "props": { "text": "Click", "ariaLabel": "Primary action" },
        "events": {
          "onClick": { "type": "action", "name": "handleClick" }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

## Component Types (23 core + extensible)

Layout: Container, Row, Column, Grid, Card, List, ListItem
Display: Text, Image, Icon, Badge, Divider, Spacer
Input: Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Switch, Slider
Action: Button, Link, Form
Custom: x-{anything}, custom:{namespace}:{name}

## Streaming Protocol

UISchema uses JSONL (newline-delimited JSON) for streaming patch operations:

```
{"op":"set","path":"/root","value":{"type":"Container","props":{"ariaLabel":"Shell"}}}
{"op":"add","path":"/root/children/-","value":{"type":"Text","props":{"text":"Loading..."}}}
{"op":"replace","path":"/root/children/0/props/text","value":"Ready!"}
```

Patch operations: set, add, replace, remove (JSON Pointer paths).

## API Surface

### Rendering
```tsx
import { UISchemaRenderer, useUIStream } from '@uischema/react';

// Static rendering
<UISchemaRenderer schema={doc} onEvent={(name, params) => {}} />

// Streaming
const { schema, loading } = useUIStream({ endpoint: '/api/generate-ui' });
```

### Generation
```ts
import { generateUISchema } from '@uischema/react/ai';
const schema = await generateUISchema('A login form', { apiKey: '...' });
```

### Builder
```ts
import { schema, node } from '@uischema/core';
const ui = schema().root(node('Container').children([...])).build();
```

### Event Bus
```ts
import { createEventBus } from '@uischema/protocol';
const bus = createEventBus();
bus.on('ui.update', handler);
bus.emit({ type: 'ui.update', payload: { node } });
```

### Validation
```ts
import { validateUISchemaDocument, validateBasicA11y } from '@uischema/core';
const result = validateUISchemaDocument(doc); // { success, data, error }
const issues = validateBasicA11y(doc.root);   // WCAG preflight
```

### CLI
```bash
npx @uischema/cli init my-project   # Scaffold new project
npx @uischema/cli validate file.json # Validate schema
npx @uischema/cli preview           # Start preview server
npx @uischema/cli generate "prompt" # AI-generate schema
```

## Event Types

- `ui.update` — AI agent pushes a new/updated UI node
- `ui.interaction` — User interacted with a component
- `ui.evaluation` — Accessibility evaluation report

## Environment Variables

```bash
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...         # OpenAI API
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...  # Anthropic API
OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-or-...  # OpenRouter (access all models)
AI_SDK_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini      # Default model (optional)
NODE_ENV=development           # Environment
DEBUG=uischema:*               # Debug logging
```

## How to Use UISchema (for AI agents)

1. **Install**: `npm install @uischema/core @uischema/react`
2. **Generate JSON**: Call any LLM with the system prompt in `docs/system-prompt.md`
3. **Validate**: `validateUISchemaDocument(json)` — returns Zod validation result
4. **Render**: `<UISchemaRenderer schema={json} onEvent={handler} />`
5. **Stream**: `useUIStream({ endpoint })` for progressive rendering

## System Prompt for AI Models

To make an AI model generate valid UISchema, use this system prompt:

```
You are a UI generator. Generate UISchema JSON documents.

UISchema uses these component types:
- Layout: Container, Row, Column, Grid, Card, List, ListItem
- Display: Text, Image, Icon, Badge, Divider, Spacer
- Input: Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Switch, Slider
- Action: Button, Link, Form

Rules:
1. All interactive components (Button, Input, etc.) MUST have ariaLabel in props
2. schemaVersion must be "0.1.0"
3. root is the top-level UISchemaNode
4. children is an array of UISchemaNode
5. events map event names to { type, name, params? }
6. Return valid JSON only

Output format:
{
  "schemaVersion": "0.1.0",
  "root": { "type": "...", "props": {...}, "children": [...] }
}
```

## Bridges

- **Open-JSON-UI**: `import { fromOpenJSONUI, toOpenJSONUI } from '@uischema/bridges'`
- **AG-UI**: `import { toAGUIEvent, fromAGUIEvent } from '@uischema/bridges'`
- **MCP Apps**: `import { createMCPAppsUpdateMessage } from '@uischema/bridges'`

## Testing

```bash
npm run build           # Build all packages
npm run type-check      # TypeScript check
npm run lint            # Biome lint
npm run test:unit       # Vitest unit tests
npm run test:openai     # OpenAI integration (needs OPENAI_API_KEY)
npm run test:anthropic  # Anthropic integration (needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
```
